title: Japan's struggling flagship H3 rocket returns to flight with the debut of a low-cost variant
summary_full: Japan's H3 rocket achieved a crucial success Friday, launching a new low-cost variant from Tanegashima Space Center. This marks a vital comeback after previous mission failures, bolstering Japan's competitive edge in the global space industry.
